name: Oatmeal Raisin Cookies/TVFN
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Beat butter, brown sugar and granulated sugar until smooth and creamy.
3. Add eggs and vanilla. Beat until well blended.
4. Whisk flour, baking soda and salt together.
5. Stir the dry ingredients into the butter mixture.
6. Add chocolate chips, oats, raisins and oat bran. Stir until well combined.
7. Drop batter by heaping tablespoonfuls onto ungreased baking sheets.
8. Bake for 12 minutes or until golden brown.
9. Cool on baking sheets.
